text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif held a call with Iranian President Pezeshkian to discuss the unfolding regional situation and negotiations with the U.S. He thanked Iran for their continued engagement in negotiations and for sending a negotiation team…" ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 The Iranian press release of the phone call between Iranian President Pezeshkian and Pakistani Prime Minister Sharif reports that Pezeshkian informed Sharif that Iran will defend Iran against any renewed U.S. adventurism. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇰🇮🇷巴基斯坦总理谢里夫与伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬通电话，讨论了当前地区局势及与美国的谈判。他感谢伊朗在谈判中持续的参与，并感谢其派遣了谈判小组……” ⚡️ 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 伊朗媒体关于伊朗总统佩泽希齐扬与巴基斯坦总理谢里夫通话的新闻稿报道称，佩泽希齐扬告知谢里夫，伊朗将捍卫自身，抵御美国任何新的冒险主义行为。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Great map of IDF control in Lebanon New maps of the frontline in Lebanon: - 1st image shows the current line of contact - 2nd image includes the newly declared Yellow Line - 3rd image includes the latest IDF/Hezbollah orders of battle IDF has a significant operational presence in 282km^2. Yellow Line is 534km^2. https://twitter.com/ThetiMapping/status/2045953353092346149/photo/1 - Theti Mapping tweet

text: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 According to the Iranian president's administration, during a phone call between Masoud Pezeshkian and Pakistan's Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif, the Iranian president noted that the US continues aggressive and irrational violations both during the negotiation process and the ceasefire period. He said that imposing a naval blockade against Iran is a clear violation of the reached agreement. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 据伊朗总统府消息，在马苏德·佩泽希齐扬与巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫的通话中，伊朗总统指出，美国在谈判进程和停火期间持续进行侵略性和非理性的违规行为。他表示，对伊朗实施海上封锁是公然违反已达成的协议。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran currently has no plans to take part in additional talks with Washington, according to state media reports. BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据官方媒体报道，伊朗目前没有计划与华盛顿进行进一步会谈。突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海上封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了TOUSKA号，并向其发出了停止前进的明确警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，直接阻止了他们的前进。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其过往的非法活动历史，TOUSKA号正受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了该船，并正在检查船上装载的物品！” - 开源情报 推文

text: NEW: The United Arab Emirates is in early talks with the U.S. about securing emergency dollar access if the Iran conflict worsens. Officials discussed a possible currency swap line with Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, though no formal request has been made. Source: WSJ

text: OSINTdefender According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, the Iranian cargo vessel, the TOUSKA, attempted to run the U.S. blockade of vessels originating from Iranian ports and offshore berthing areas and was intercepted by the USS Spruance (DDG-111) and given repeated warning to turn around. After failing to heed these warnings, the Spruance targeted the engine room of the vessel and the vessel was subsequently boarded by the U.S. Marines. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普称，伊朗货船“TOUSKA”号试图突破美国对源自伊朗港口和海上停泊区船只的封锁，被斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（USS Spruance, DDG-111）拦截，并多次收到转向警告。在未能理会这些警告后，斯普鲁恩斯号瞄准了该船的机舱，随后美国海军陆战队登上了该船。推文

text: Open Source Intel President Donald Trump said the U.S. Navy destroyer USS Spruance (DDG-111) intercepted the Iranian-flagged vessel TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and that the ship is now in U.S. custody. BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：唐纳德·特朗普总统表示，美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰（DDG-111）在阿曼湾拦截了悬挂伊朗国旗的“TOUSKA”号货船，目前该船已被美国扣押。突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并向他们发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，所以我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在查看船上的货物！” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : #BREAKING ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ U.S. President Donald Trump stated that U.S. naval forces struck and stopped an Iranian-flagged cargo vessel in the Gulf of Oman after it ignored warnings: 📌 “Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named ‘TOUSKA,’ nearly 900 feet long (about 275 meters), attempted to breach our naval blockade — it ended badly for them.” 📌 “The U.S. Navy destroyer USS Spruance intercepted TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman and issued a lawful warning to stop. The crew ignored it, so we disabled the vessel by striking its engine section. U.S. Marines now fully control the ship.” 📌 “TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury sanctions due to prior illegal activity. The vessel is now in our possession, and we are determining what is on board,” Trump said. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：#突发 ❗️ ❗️ ❗️ 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，美国海军部队在阿曼湾拦截并阻止了一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船，此前该船无视警告：📌 “今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺（约275米）的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁——这对他们来说结局很糟糕。” 📌 “美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并发布了合法的停止警告。船员无视了警告，所以我们通过打击其发动机舱使该船瘫痪。美国海军陆战队现在完全控制了该船。” 📌 “由于以往的非法活动，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。该船现在由我们控制，我们正在确定船上的货物，”特朗普说。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Instant News Alerts #BREAKING : US Navy assets "blew a hole in the engine room" and seized an Iranian-flagged cargo ship attempting to pass the US blockade https://twitter.com/InstaNewsAlerts/status/2045949960491876479/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Instant News Alerts：#突发：美国海军资产“炸毁了机舱”，并扣押了一艘试图通过美国封锁线的悬挂伊朗国旗的货船 https://twitter.com/InstaNewsAlerts/status/2045949960491876479/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump says that US forces fired on an Iranian-flagged container ship attempting to run the blockade, with Marines then seizing the vessel in the Arabian Sea. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045948393994723824/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical：特朗普表示，美国军队向一艘试图突破封锁的悬挂伊朗国旗的集装箱船开火，随后海军陆战队在阿拉伯海扣押了该船。https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045948393994723824/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel BREAKING: 🔴 U.S. President Donald Trump: "Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel：突发：🔴 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并向他们发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，所以我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在查看船上的货物！” 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | Donald Trump says an Iranian cargo ship was struck and boarded: “Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, attempted to breach our naval blockade — and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy guided missile destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman and issued a fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to comply, after which our Navy ship stopped them in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engine room. U.S. Marines now have control of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury sanctions due to its prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship and are inspecting what’s on board.” See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 突发 | 唐纳德·特朗普称一艘伊朗货船被击中并被登船检查：“今天，一艘悬挂伊朗国旗、长近900英尺、重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰的货船‘TOUSKA’号试图突破我们的海军封锁——这对他们来说结局很糟糕。美国海军导弹驱逐舰斯普鲁恩斯号在阿曼湾拦截了‘TOUSKA’号，并发布了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝配合，随后我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。美国海军陆战队现在控制了该船。由于其以往的非法活动历史，‘TOUSKA’号受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在检查船上的货物。” 与我们一起查看最新更新：@visionergeo 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iran says it is fully prepared for a possible resumption of war, pointing to recent U.S. military movements — including naval redeployments, an unprecedented airlift of equipment, and intensified reconnaissance drone activity over Iranian islands. 🟥 Tehran is considering two main scenarios: U.S. maneuvers are psychological pressure aimed at gaining leverage in negotiations. They represent preparations for a sudden strike — noting that Washington has already carried out strikes during the current negotiation process. 🔹 Iran says it has reorganized and prepared its forces over the past two weeks, warning that any renewed conflict would create “unforgettable hellish hours” from the outset. 📌 According to Tasnim, citing IRGC officials: ▪️ If war resumes and Iranian infrastructure is targeted again, Tehran threatens to abandon its previous restraint and expand the conflict zone. ▪️ Potential targets could include the Bab el-Mandeb Strait, Saudi Aramco facilities, and strategic ports and oil terminals in Saudi Arabia and the UAE, such as Yanbu and Fujairah. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Visioner 转发 @NSTRIKE1231：🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗表示已为可能恢复的战争做好充分准备，并指出美国近期的军事行动——包括海军重新部署、前所未有的装备空运，以及在伊朗岛屿上空加强的侦察无人机活动。 🟥 德黑兰正在考虑两种主要方案：美国的演习是旨在在谈判中获得筹码的心理压力。它们代表了突然袭击的准备——并指出华盛顿在当前的谈判过程中已经进行了打击。 🔹 伊朗表示，过去两周已重组并准备了其部队，警告称任何冲突的重燃都将从一开始就制造“令人难忘的地狱时刻”。 📌 据塔斯尼姆通讯社援引伊斯兰革命卫队官员的话：▪️ 如果战争重燃且伊朗基础设施再次成为目标，德黑兰威胁要放弃此前的克制并扩大冲突区域。▪️ 潜在目标可能包括曼德海峡、沙特阿美设施，以及沙特和阿联酋的战略港口和石油码头，如延布和富查伊拉。与我们一起查看最新更新：@NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - Trump says that U.S. Marines intercepted and have custody of Iranian-flagged cargo ship, TOUSKA, that ignored warnings and tried to get past the Naval Blockade:" We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what’s on board!" tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：最新消息 - 特朗普称美国海军陆战队拦截并控制了悬挂伊朗国旗的货船“TOUSKA”号，该船无视警告并试图突破海军封锁：“我们已完全控制了这艘船，并正在查看船上的货物！” 推文

text: Faytuks News BREAKING: The US Navy has struck an Iranian-flagged cargo ship in the Gulf of Oman after it was warned to stop, according to President Trump U.S marines have custody of the vessel. https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045947837188288809/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News：突发：据特朗普总统称，美国海军在阿曼湾警告一艘悬挂伊朗国旗的货船停止航行后，对其进行了打击。美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。https://twitter.com/Faytuks/status/2045947837188288809/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @TheWarMonitor : Not a great sign when someone needs a full weeklong event just to convince people they’re a Christian. Trump will take part in a weeklong public reading of the Bible in Washington, D.C., organized by conservative Christian leaders. Source: NYT https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转发 @TheWarMonitor：当一个人需要举办为期一周的活动才能让人们相信他是基督徒时，这可不是什么好兆头。特朗普将参加由保守派基督教领袖在华盛顿特区组织的为期一周的公开读经活动。来源：纽约时报 https://twitter.com/clashreport/status/2045615778452459918/photo/1 - Clash Report 推文

text: Israel is preparing for a renewed phase of intense fighting across Gaza at the start of next month. This follows Hamas’s refusal to disarm, prompting Israeli officials to plan an escalation, with early next month set as the latest deadline. Source: Israeli Channel 14
text_zh: 以色列正准备在下月初开始在加沙进行新一轮激烈的战斗。此前哈马斯拒绝解除武装，促使以色列官员计划升级行动，并将下月初定为最后期限。来源：以色列第14频道

text: OSINTdefender Iranians officials are lowering expectations of this week’s talks in Islamabad and appear suspicious that President Trump’s talk of a deal could be cover for a U.S. surprise attack, according to Axios. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据Axios报道，伊朗官员降低了对本周伊斯兰堡会谈的预期，并怀疑特朗普总统关于达成协议的言论可能是美国发动突然袭击的掩护。推文

text: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 BFM: A French cargo ship owned by CMA CGM was fired upon with warning shots yesterday. None of the crew were injured in the incident. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇮🇷 BFM：一艘由达飞海运集团（CMA CGM）拥有的法国货船昨天遭到警告性射击。事件中没有船员受伤。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: Today, an Iranian-flagged cargo ship named TOUSKA, nearly 900 feet long and weighing almost as much as an aircraft carrier, tried to get past our Naval Blockade, and it did not go well for them. The U.S. Navy Guided Missile Destroyer USS SPRUANCE intercepted the TOUSKA in the Gulf of Oman, and gave them fair warning to stop. The Iranian crew refused to listen, so our Navy ship stopped them right in their tracks by blowing a hole in the engineroom. Right now, U.S. Marines have custody of the vessel. The TOUSKA is under U.S. Treasury Sanctions because of their prior history of illegal activity. We have full custody of the ship, and are seeing what's on board! 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：今天，一艘名为TOUSKA的伊朗籍货船，长近900英尺，重量几乎相当于一艘航空母舰，试图突破我们的海军封锁，但结果对他们来说并不好。美国海军斯普鲁恩斯号（USS SPRUANCE）导弹驱逐舰在阿曼湾拦截了TOUSKA号，并向其发出了明确的停止警告。伊朗船员拒绝听从，因此我们的海军舰艇通过炸毁其机舱，当场阻止了他们。目前，美国海军陆战队已控制了该船。TOUSKA号因其过往的非法活动记录而受到美国财政部的制裁。我们已完全控制了这艘船，正在查看船上装载了什么！ 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar: The IDF has withdrew from the outskirts of Rshaf and Wadi Al-Ayoun towards the town of Dibl, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 《消息报》（Al-Akhbar）：以色列国防军已从黎巴嫩南部拉沙夫（Rshaf）和瓦迪阿永（Wadi Al-Ayoun）郊区撤退至迪布尔（Dibl）镇。 @wfwitness
